// About DataForge

Real Systems.
Zero Fluff.

01

Who We
Are

DataForge is a boutique data analytics and web consulting practice based in Wichita, Kansas. We build the kind of systems — dashboards, automations, websites, AI-augmented workflows — that used to require an enterprise budget or a full internal team.

We work directly with small and regional businesses: no account managers, no offshore handoffs, no inflated agency margins. Every engagement is scoped honestly, priced realistically, and delivered by the same person you talk to on the first call.

The goal: give Wichita businesses the same caliber of data infrastructure and web presence that larger competitors take for granted — without the enterprise price tag attached.

100%
On-time delivery
Direct
No middlemen
Fixed
Scoped pricing
// Tech Stack
01
Python
Data pipelines, automation & scripting
02
SQL
Analytics, reporting & data modeling
03
JavaScript
Web builds, tooling & API integrations
04
PowerShell
System scripting & Windows automation
05
Webflow
Web design, CMS & no-code delivery
02

How I
Work

01
Discovery

A focused call to understand the problem, your data, and what already exists. No pitch — just listening.

02
Proposal

A written scope with clear deliverables, timeline, and fixed price. No vague estimates. No surprise overages.

03
Build

Iterative delivery with milestone check-ins. You see work before the finish line — not just at it.

04
Deliver

Clean handoff with documentation and training. You own it completely. No ongoing dependency on me.

// Let's Build Something

Ready to Get
Started?

Discovery calls are free and take 30 minutes. Come with a problem — leave knowing whether we're the right fit to solve it.

Book a Discovery Call View Services
